page.title: Tools
page.bannerDescription: Connect external services so assistants can look things up, work across platforms, and finish real tasks.

empty.builtinDescription: Built-in tools are generated from the runtime registry and mcp/builtin.
empty.installedDescription: Find MCP providers on the Discover tab or create a custom MCP tool.

actions.checkTitle: Check whether this MCP is available

mcp.noRemoteTools: No tool list has been fetched yet. It will reconnect to the MCP server after you edit and save.

editor.subtitle: Paste MCP client configuration directly
editor.noDiscoveredTools: No remote tools have been fetched yet. Saving will reconnect to the MCP server.

providers.bigmodel: Curated MCP providers for fast setup

system.name: System information
system.description: Get time, location, hardware, network, and other system details

browseruse.name: Browser Use
browseruse.description: Control Chrome and operate web pages

task.name: Task management
task.description: Maintain todo lists and track task progress

network.name: Network tools
network.description: Search the web and read page content

file.name: File operations
file.description: Read, write, edit, and organize files and folders

office.name: Office creation
office.description: Generate Word, PPT, and PDF files

project.name: Project
project.description: List and read historical conversations in the current project

knowledge.name: Knowledge base
knowledge.description: Search knowledge base documents for relevant context

memory.name: Long-term memory
memory.description: Search, write, and forget user preferences and project context

image.name: Image tools
image.description: Generate images and save them as session artifacts

dev.name: Developer tools
dev.description: Run shell commands and project scripts

skill.name: Skills
skill.description: Inspect and read skills available to the current assistant

interaction.name: User interaction
interaction.description: Ask the user for input and collect choices

subagent.name: Subagent collaboration
subagent.description: Call other assistants to handle clear subtasks

system_info.name: System information
system_info.description: Get system information including current time, time zone, location, hardware, and network status.

windows_snapshot.name: Windows screenshot
windows_snapshot.description: Capture the active Windows window or desktop with a UI tree, including clickable element positions and details.

windows_accessibility_tree.name: Get UI tree
windows_accessibility_tree.description: Get the UI Automation tree without a screenshot. Faster than snapshot and useful for frequent UI reads.

windows_list_windows.name: List windows
windows_list_windows.description: List all top-level desktop windows with titles, process IDs, handles, and related information.

windows_find.name: Windows find
windows_find.description: Find UI elements in Windows applications.

windows_element_info.name: Element info
windows_element_info.description: Get detailed information for a UI element or the element at specific coordinates.

windows_focus.name: Focus element
windows_focus.description: Move focus to a specified element using UI Automation.

windows_invoke.name: Invoke element
windows_invoke.description: Use UIA patterns to operate an element, falling back to click when needed.

windows_set_value.name: Set element value
windows_set_value.description: Use UIA ValuePattern to set the value of an input control.

windows_activate_window.name: Activate window
windows_activate_window.description: Activate a target window by title, process ID, or HWND.

windows_click.name: Windows click
windows_click.description: Click a coordinate or UI element in a Windows application.

windows_double_click.name: Windows double-click
windows_double_click.description: Double-click a coordinate or UI element in a Windows application.

windows_move.name: Move mouse
windows_move.description: Move the pointer to a coordinate or the center of a UI element.

windows_drag.name: Windows drag
windows_drag.description: Perform mouse dragging along a path.

windows_scroll.name: Windows scroll
windows_scroll.description: Scroll content in a Windows application.

windows_type.name: Windows type
windows_type.description: Type text into the currently focused Windows control.

windows_keypress.name: Windows keypress
windows_keypress.description: Press keyboard keys or shortcuts in a Windows application.

windows_wait.name: Windows wait
windows_wait.description: Wait for animations, loading, or focus changes to complete.

windows_batch.name: Windows batch actions
windows_batch.description: Run multiple Computer Use actions in sequence to reduce round trips.

browser_scan.name: Scan page
browser_scan.description: Scan page content and extract text or structured information.

browser_snapshot.name: Page snapshot
browser_snapshot.description: Get an actionable page snapshot and generate @e references for later clicks or fills.

browser_click.name: Click element
browser_click.description: Click page elements using CSS selectors or @e references.

browser_drag.name: Drag element
browser_drag.description: Simulate dragging a source element to a target element on the page.

browser_upload.name: Upload file
browser_upload.description: Upload local files through a file input.

browser_execute.name: Execute script
browser_execute.description: Run JavaScript code on the page.

browser_console.name: Console logs
browser_console.description: Listen to and read page console logs and exceptions.

update_todos.name: Update todos
update_todos.description: Maintain the current task todo list and sync progress with a complete list.

list_agents.name: List assistants
list_agents.description: List installed and built-in assistants with names, descriptions, types, and tags.

delegate_task.name: Delegate to subagent
delegate_task.description: Defaults to default/Cowork; after listing assistants it can target an installed assistant, or create a temporary subagent for a clear subtask.

schedule_task.name: Create scheduled task
schedule_task.description: Create a background scheduled task for one-off, recurring, or Cron-based Agent runs.

list_schedule_tasks.name: List scheduled tasks
list_schedule_tasks.description: List existing background tasks with task ID, name, enabled state, and next run time.

update_schedule_task.name: Edit scheduled task
update_schedule_task.description: Modify an existing scheduled task by task ID or name.

delete_schedule_task.name: Delete scheduled task
delete_schedule_task.description: Delete an existing scheduled task by task ID or name.

start_background_task.name: Start background task
start_background_task.description: Run a long asynchronous task in an independent background Agent session and immediately return a jobId.

list_background_tasks.name: List background tasks
list_background_tasks.description: List in-app background Agent jobs with jobId, name, status, creation time, and completion time.

get_background_task.name: Get background task
get_background_task.description: Inspect a background task's status, progress events, error, or final result.

cancel_background_task.name: Cancel background task
cancel_background_task.description: Cancel a background Agent task that is still running.

ask_user.name: Ask user
ask_user.description: Request input, single choice, or multiple choice; prompts support Markdown and choice modes append a custom input option.

list_skills.name: List skills
list_skills.description: List skill names and use cases available to the current assistant.

read_skill.name: Read skill
read_skill.description: Read the full SKILL.md instructions and directory tree for an available skill.

read_skill_file.name: Read skill file
read_skill_file.description: Read files under references, examples, and other subfolders in an available skill directory.

write_skill.name: Write skill
write_skill.description: Create, edit, patch, or delete custom skills.

read_file.name: Read file
read_file.description: Read the text content of a specified file under the workspace.

write_file.name: Write file
write_file.description: Write content to a file under the workspace and register it in the artifacts panel.

edit_file.name: Edit file
edit_file.description: Make exact replacement edits with oldString -> newString, suited for targeted changes.

create_directory.name: Create directory
create_directory.description: Create a directory under the workspace, including required parent directories.

delete_file.name: Delete path
delete_file.description: Delete a file or directory under the workspace; directories are removed recursively.

list_directory.name: List directory
list_directory.description: List files and subdirectories under the workspace or a specified directory.

move_file.name: Move/rename
move_file.description: Move or rename files and directories across or within folders.

copy_file.name: Copy file
copy_file.description: Copy a file or directory to a target location.

search_files.name: Search files
search_files.description: Search files and directories with Glob patterns.

create_office_document.name: Create office document
create_office_document.description: Generate Word, PPT, or PDF files and save them as previewable artifacts.

list_project_conversations.name: List project conversations
list_project_conversations.description: List other conversations in the current project with title, ID, and update time.

read_project_conversation.name: Read project conversation
read_project_conversation.description: Read recent messages from a specified historical conversation in the current project.

web_search.name: Web search
web_search.description: Search the internet and return results with titles, links, and summaries.

web_fetch.name: Read web page
web_fetch.description: Read page body text with optional heading, anchor, link, and table extraction.

image_generation.name: Generate image
image_generation.description: Call an image generation model and save generated images to the workspace.

image_edit.name: Edit image
image_edit.description: Call an image editing model to edit a local source image with an optional mask.

speech_recognition.name: Speech recognition
speech_recognition.description: Transcribe audio files to text, supporting common formats such as mp3, wav, m4a, webm, and ogg.

speech_synthesis.name: Speech synthesis
speech_synthesis.description: Synthesize text into speech, save it to the workspace, and register it as an artifact.

run_bash.name: Run command
run_bash.description: Run a shell command in the session workspace and return stdout and stderr. Dangerous commands are blocked.

search_knowledge.name: Search knowledge base
search_knowledge.description: Search enabled knowledge bases for relevant document snippets and project context.

search_memory.name: Search memory
search_memory.description: Search long-term memory for preferences, corrections, and project context.

remember_memory.name: Remember memory
remember_memory.description: Write long-term memory when the user asks to remember something or corrects a durable preference.

render_widget.name: Render widget
render_widget.description: Render an interactive UI widget in the conversation.
